description: Team splits into two subgroups scheduling parallel work sessions, plus a full-group Thursday sync.

events.title: Frontend Work Session
events.reasoning: Bob and Carol form one subgroup for frontend work. They agree on Wednesday at 1 PM for 2 hours in the creative studio.

events.title: Backend Integration Session
events.reasoning: Alice and Dave form the second subgroup for backend integration. Alice sets Tuesday at 10 AM for 2 hours in the server room. Dave confirms.

events.title: Full Group Sync
events.reasoning: Alice proposes a full group sync on Thursday at 3 PM to share findings. All four speakers confirm.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 3 events: two parallel subgroup sessions and a full group sync on Thursday.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24, Wednesday=Feb 25, Thursday=Feb 26. Alice and Dave are not in the frontend session; Bob and Carol are not in the backend session.
